title: kalimeris lautureana
intro: Kalimeris lautureana, also known as Laureated Kalimeris, is a flowering plant species within the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Kalimeris lautureana include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. Kalimeris lautureana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in the form of dried flowers and roots for medicinal purposes.
